disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep, constant, central abdominal pain radiating through to the lower back, present about 12 hours and steadily worsening through the evening
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and does it go anywhere?
When did it start and how has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep ache right in the middle of my stomach and it goes through to my lower back. It started about twelve hours ago and it's just kept getting worse all evening.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A strong pulsating or throbbing sensation felt by the patient in the mid-abdomen
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel anything unusual in your tummy?
Can you feel any beating or throbbing in your abdomen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I can feel a strong pulse beating in the middle of my belly, like a throbbing that keeps time with my heart.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and near-faint on standing (presyncope); no actual loss of consciousness
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt dizzy, faint or lightheaded?
What happens when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stood up earlier I went really lightheaded and nearly fainted, so now I'm just staying lying down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spouse reports the patient looks pale and washed out
trigger_question_examples: How does he look to you right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He looks pale and washed out to me — that's part of why I'm so worried.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing high blood pressure treated with a daily tablet
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing health conditions?
Are you on any regular medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got high blood pressure and I take a tablet for it every day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is not affected by movement or position changes
trigger_question_examples: Does moving, bending or twisting change the pain?
Is there any position that makes it better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, moving around doesn't really change it — it's there no matter what I do.
